title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Supertech Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Supertech Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Supertech Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Supertech Ventures Solutions:
Supertech Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech Ventures Solutions!
